params.eeePointer: Swarm or IPFS URI pointing to the EEE JSON for this epoch
params.epoch: Epoch number inside the EEE (must be >= current epoch)
params.swarmOverlay: Swarm overlay address of the node hosting the data

getChannel(bytes32).notice: Returns the current channel state for `channelId`.         Returns zero-values if the channel has never been registered.

getEEE(bytes32).notice: Convenience getter — returns only the EEE pointer and epoch.

setChannel(bytes32,string,bytes32,uint25.notice: Publish a new EEE pointer for `channelId`.
